info.title: Flight Delay Risk API
info.description: Ranks scheduled flights by arrival-delay risk and returns a post-hoc calibrated estimate of 15+ minute delay, using only pre-flight schedule-time information. Includes a European context layer.

origin.title: Origin
origin.description: European origin airport IATA code, e.g. 'BCN'.

destination.title: Destination
destination.description: European destination airport IATA code, e.g. 'AMS'.

EuropeanFlightInput.title: EuropeanFlightInput
EuropeanFlightInput.description: Experimental European flight layer. Distance is auto-estimated if missing.

delay_probability.title: Delay Probability
delay_probability.description: Post-hoc calibrated estimate of a 15+ minute arrival delay.

raw_model_score.title: Raw Model Score
raw_model_score.description: Uncalibrated score emitted by the selected classifier.

calibration_method.title: Calibration Method
calibration_method.description: Post-hoc calibration method applied to the raw score.

decision_threshold.title: Decision Threshold
decision_threshold.description: Probability threshold used for binary risk decisions.

top_factors.title: Top Factors
top_factors.description: Non-causal schedule-context signals for this flight.

local_contributions.title: Local Contributions
local_contributions.description: Signed local pre-calibration log-odds contributions from the selected model.

explanation_scale.title: Explanation Scale
explanation_scale.description: Scale used by local model contributions.

review_recommended.title: Review Recommended
review_recommended.description: Whether the configured operational policy sends this flight to priority review.

crs_dep_time.title: Crs Dep Time
crs_dep_time.description: Scheduled departure time, HHMM format. 2400 is accepted as midnight.

crs_arr_time.title: Crs Arr Time
crs_arr_time.description: Scheduled arrival time, HHMM format. 2400 is accepted as midnight.

flight_date.title: Flight Date
flight_date.description: Optional ISO scheduled date for exact calendar features.

FlightInput.title: FlightInput
FlightInput.description: A single scheduled flight, described using only pre-flight information.

crs_dep_time.title: Crs Dep Time
crs_dep_time.description: Scheduled departure time, HHMM format. 2400 is accepted as midnight.

crs_arr_time.title: Crs Arr Time
crs_arr_time.description: Scheduled arrival time, HHMM format. 2400 is accepted as midnight.
